content: design a protein with 4 alpha helices

parts.text: design a protein with 4 alpha helices

content: I'll design a 4-helix bundle — a classic, stable fold with ~100-120 residues. The subagent will generate this using RFdiffusion's unconditional mode with appropriate contig length constraints. 3 iterations to refine the result.
